content:
New Role. New Challenges. New Opportunities. ✨

I'm excited to share that I've joined Integreon as a Senior Attorney Associate.
Every career move brings new opportunities to learn, grow, and challenge yourself. I'm grateful for everyone who has been part of my journey so far and excited to begin this new chapter with the amazing team at Integreon.

Looking forward to learning, contributing, and growing together.
Here's to new beginnings! 🚀

#CareerUpdate #NewRole #SeniorAssociate #Integreon #LegalProfession #GrowthMindset #NewJourney #newjob
comment: In LPO setups like this, early success often depends on quickly internalizing client playbooks and escalation paths—more than pure legal expertise.
